song.title: My Master
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I love, I love my Master I will not go out free, For He is my Redeemer, He paid the price for me,|| I would not leave His service, It is so sweet and blest' And in the weariest moments He gives the truest rest.
[V2] 2) My Master shed His lifeblood My vassal life to win, And save me from the bondage Of tyrant self and sin.|| He chose me for His service, And gave me pow’r to choose That blessed, perfect freedom, Which I shall never lose.
[V3] 3) I would not halve my service, His only it must be! His only, who so loved me, And gave Himself for me.|| Rejoicing and adoring, Henceforth my song shall be, I love, I love my Master, I will not go out free.
